article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.1. Update on Mayor's Task Force on Burnaby Economic Growth and Resilience 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Update on Mayor's Task Force on Burnaby Economic Growth
briefs.summary: Council will consider an update on the Mayor's Task Force on Burnaby Economic Growth and Resilience, a group studying how to strengthen Burnaby's local economy. The Task Force is gathering input from businesses and will bring final recommendations to Council on June 23, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the Task Force's final recommendations to Council on June 23, 2026 — they could shape city business support.

key_dates.label: Mayor's Task Force final recommendations presented to Burnaby Council
